title: Moonbeam Minecraft
description:
Mostly for personal use but feel free to enjoy it :)

Focused on mechanics via create and magic plus expanding the world and blocks
body:
UPDATE: THIS MODPACK IS CURRENTLY GOING THROUGH A REWORK FOR A PUBLIC SERVER RELEASE.

AS PART OF THIS IT WILL BE SWAPPING TO FORGE AND REQUIRE WORLD WIPES!

(OLD VERSIONS WILL STAY AVAILABLE)

This modpack provides all required mods for playing on Moonbeam Minecraft - currently the personal server for myself and friends. 

Download this if you want to play!

This modpack will ONLY work on Fabric, and Minecraft version 1.20.1!

It includes iris shader functionality but does not come with any included shaders or resource packs so if you wish to use any you must add it yourself.

This modpack contains the following;
